name: Chocolate Liqueur Shells
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces each of semi-sweet chocolate, bittersweet chocolate, milk chocolate, and white chocolate, melted separately
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolates together in separate bowls until smooth.
2. Pour into desired shell molds or form individual shells on parchment paper.
3. Allow to cool completely before removing from the molds.
4. Serve and enjoy!
